name: vox
description: Local-first macOS transcription runtime with Swift services, a Bun CLI, and a TypeScript SDK.

scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/client build && bun run --cwd packages/cli build && swift build --package-path swift
scripts.build:all: bun run build && bun run site:build
scripts.site:build: bun run --cwd site build && bun run docs:build && cp -r docs-site/dist/. site/out/
scripts.test: bun test packages/client/test packages/cli/test && swift test --package-path swift
scripts.test:e2e: swift build --package-path swift --product voxd && VOX_E2E=1 bun test packages/client/test/transcribe-file.e2e.test.ts
